21 pre_ICL_apply How Pre-ICL cost shares are applied Char 1 Indicates how plan charges cost sharing before the Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) is reached. 1 25% coinsurance amount *2006 value definitions are different than 2007 value definitions.
 2 One or more groups of cost sharing
 3 No cost sharing
22 icl_apply How ICL is applied Char 1 Indicates whether plan applies the Medicare-defined Part D Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) Amount. 1 Medicare-defined
